summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NSE Quant Engine Phase 2 features - all new backend APIs and frontend functionality working perfectly. Tested 5 new Phase 2 backend endpoints with 100% success rate and all new frontend features including 4 scan level buttons, Sectors/Alerts tabs, TRADE column, news sentiment analysis, and trade type classification.
passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/scan/levels returns scan level info (nifty50: 49 stocks, nifty100: 97 stocks, nifty200: 187 stocks, full: 286 stocks)
Backend API: GET /api/sectors/heatmap returns 11 sectors with performance data (avg_change, quality scores, regime counts)
Backend API: GET /api/news/TCS returns 8 articles with sentiment analysis (NEUTRAL 57/100 overall sentiment)
Backend API: GET /api/alerts/settings returns alert configuration (email: gauravmusale.gm.18@gmail.com, enabled: false)
Backend API: GET /api/alerts/regime-changes returns regime change history (0 changes currently)
Backend API: POST /api/scan/start with universe=nifty200 validated (scan already running, endpoint accepts request)
Frontend: Dashboard shows 4 scan level buttons (Nifty 50, 100, 200+, Full Market) - all clickable
Frontend: Tabs include Sectors and Alerts tabs alongside existing tabs
Frontend: Sectors tab shows 11 sector cards with performance bars and metrics (stocks, quality, sprinters, compounders)
Frontend: Alerts tab shows email config info (gauravmusale.gm.18@gmail.com) and regime change history section
Frontend: Stock table has TRADE column header with 20 trade type badges visible
Frontend: Clicking TCS stock opens DeepDive with news sentiment section working
Frontend: DeepDive shows trade type badges in Recommended Action section (INVEST badge for TCS)
Frontend: News articles load with sentiment badge (NEUTRAL 57/100) and 5 news articles displayed
Frontend: News sentiment analysis using GPT-5-nano working correctly with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
All Phase 1 features continue to work: watchlist, portfolio, macro data, confidence widget, regime columns

success_percentage.backend: 100% (22/22 API endpoints working including 5 new Phase 2 endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Phase 2 UI components and integrations working)
